tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Perform arithmetic calculations on mathematical expressions. Supports basic operations like +, -, *, /, and functions like abs, round, min, max, sum, pow.

tools.name: search_web
tools.description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo and return formatted results with titles, descriptions, and URLs. Useful for finding current information, facts, and resources.

tools.name: call_service1
tools.description: Call Service1 API with user authentication token. Used for making authenticated requests where the user's Keycloak token is forwarded directly. Parameters: endpoint (string), method (string, default POST), payload (object), auth_token (string).

tools.name: call_service2
tools.description: Call Service2 API with admin authentication and client context headers (x-client-ref, x-client-username). Used for admin-authenticated requests with user context. Parameters: endpoint (string), method (string, default POST), payload (object), roles (array), username (string).

tools.name: call_external_service
tools.description: Generic external service caller that routes to Service1 or Service2 based on service_name parameter. Parameters: service_name ('service1' or 'service2'), endpoint (string), method (string), payload (object), auth_token (string), roles (array), username (string).
